summary: Frontend-only smoke + UI integration testing for Harshita Infrastructure marketing site. All 13 functional requirements from the review request passed. Site loads on / with correct hero, all data-testids present, all wa.me/tel:/mailto: CTAs have correct hrefs, smooth-scroll nav works, mobile menu toggle opens/closes drawer at 390px, all images render, no JS console errors, count-up stats show final values (100+, 28 States, 100%, 10+), and footer credit is present.

issues: Footer credit text reads 'Website built by Shivam Tiwari' — PRD asked for 'Built by Shivam Tiwari'. Required substring 'Built by Shivam Tiwari' is technically present (case-insensitive contains 'built by Shivam Tiwari'), so this is informational only. No action needed unless exact wording is required.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero headline 'Earthwork. Surfaces. Built solid.' is split across 3 sibling elements. Functionally fine, but a single accessible heading or aria-label would help screen readers and text-based selectors.
All CTAs share the same prefilled WhatsApp text. Consider per-service prefilled messages (e.g., 'interested in Soil Dumping') for better lead routing — minor enhancement, not a bug.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static React marketing site (no backend). Verified at desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x844. All data-testids in place: hero-whatsapp-cta, service-card-{soil,white-cement,wall-putty}, project-card-{0,1,2}, testimonial-{0,1,2}, contact-{whatsapp,satyam,sachin,email}-card, stat-{projects-completed,pan-india-reach,quality-assured,years-of-experience}, mobile-menu-toggle, whatsapp-floating-button, footer-credit. IntersectionObserver-based reveal animations work; counters reach final values within ~3s of scrolling into view.
